missing_runtime: Objective-C GPB runtime headers in the installed include tree
evidence.reason: The available ASan build only packages the C++ protobuf runtime, while the finding is in the Objective-C runtime path used by GPBUnknownFields.

build_request.build_hint: Build the Objective-C runtime with ASan and stage it as builds/protobuf-objc-asan-arm64/ with compile_flags.txt, link_flags.txt, headers, and libProtocolBuffers.a
build_request.why: GPBUnknownFields lives in the Objective-C runtime and cannot be exercised through the existing C++-only ASan archive set.
